* Data and Tables

#+CAPTION: Monthly data
#+NAME: monthly-data
| Month | Revenue | Expenses |
|-------+---------+----------|
| Jan   |   10000 |     7500 |
| Feb   |   12000 |     8000 |
| Mar   |   11500 |     7800 |

#+BEGIN_SRC python :var data=monthly-data :results output
for row in data:
    print(f"{row[0]}: profit = {row[1] - row[2]}")
#+END_SRC
